more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: 15 Zimbabweans die fighting for Russia in Ukraine war: minister
more.description: HARARE – Fifteen Zimbabweans have died while fighting on the Russian side in the Russia-Ukraine war, a minister said on Wednesday, marking the first official acknowledgment of the scale of local involvement.
